scores.notes: Major issues: Incorrect company name ('BOOKTA K(TAMANDAYA)SDNBHD' vs 'BOOK TA .K (TAMAN DAYA) SDN BHD'), garbled address ('NO5S9AASA08 TANAN DAYA BLUU JOHIORBANRU' vs correct address), incorrect date format ('25/12201881339P9' vs '25/12/2018'). Table structure is poorly preserved. Numeric precision is partially correct ('9.00' is present but garbled with other text). Layout is disrupted with random text and images.
